title: UPSC Editorial Analysis: India’s Jobless Growth and Education Crisis
description: General Studies-3; Topic: Indian Economy and issues relating to planning, mobilization of resources, growth, development and employment.   Introduction India’s economic narrative is currently split between two conflicting realities.
